final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic movie poster for A Chinese Odyssey, reimagined in 1990s Hong Kong film style.

Style/medium: 1990s Hong Kong cinema poster aesthetic, Wong Kar-wai inspired, film grain texture, analog film photography
Composition: wide shot with three planes of depth, medium shot of embracing couple in foreground, silhouettes in distant background
Subject: Zhi Zunbao and Zixia in an emotional embrace and kiss on ancient city wall, period costumes, flowing robes
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese fortress wall at dusk, atmospheric haze, distant silhouettes of Bull Demon King and Tang Monk standing apart
Lighting/mood: golden hour sunset backlighting, warm romantic glow with melancholic undertones, soft rim light on figures
Color palette: warm amber and gold tones dominant, deep shadows with cyan undertones, nostalgic faded film look
Materials/textures: visible 35mm film grain, slight chromatic aberration, matte paper poster texture
Constraints: must evoke 1990s Hong Kong cinema nostalgia; characters must be recognizable as the iconic film figures
Avoid: modern digital clean look, oversaturated colors, anime style, deformed faces, watermark text, 8K stuffer aesthetic
